task_completion.description: Document title and headings are formatted with appropriate styles
task_completion.visual_evidence: The document title is styled prominently (Title style), and sections/subsections use distinct Heading 1 and Heading 2 styles (visible visually or in the styles dropdown).

task_completion.description: Four distinct formatted tables are created from the prose
task_completion.visual_evidence: Four distinct tables are visible in the document with gridlines, containing the specified headers (e.g., 'Name, Title, Office Phone, Cell Phone' for contacts, 'Floor, Primary Warden...' for wardens, etc.).

task_completion.description: Body text is formatted with a consistent 11pt or 12pt font
task_completion.visual_evidence: The body text appears uniform in size, and the font size indicator in the word processor toolbar shows 11 or 12 when body text is selected or being edited.

task_completion.description: Specific safety keywords are bolded throughout the document
task_completion.visual_evidence: The keywords 'EVACUATE', 'SHELTER IN PLACE', 'LOCKDOWN', 'CALL 911', and 'DO NOT' are visibly bolded wherever they appear in the text.

task_completion.description: The formatted document is saved with the correct filename
task_completion.visual_evidence: The application title bar shows 'emergency_action_plan_formatted.docx' or a save dialog is visible saving the file as 'emergency_action_plan_formatted.docx' in the Documents folder.

integrity.description: The agent used a GUI word processor to format the document
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent is seen using a word processor GUI (e.g., LibreOffice Writer) to edit the document, rather than using terminal commands or scripts to generate the file.

integrity.description: The tables are genuine word processor tables
integrity.visual_evidence: The tables are actual word processor tables with gridlines and cells, not just plain text aligned with spaces, tabs, or markdown pipes.

integrity.description: The agent did not just copy-paste the prompt into the document
integrity.visual_evidence: The document contains the actual emergency action plan content for 'Meridian Business Center', not the task instructions.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The input file is '/home/ga/Documents/emergency_action_plan_raw.docx'. The expected output file is '/home/ga/Documents/emergency_action_plan_formatted.docx'. The document must contain exactly 4 tables: Contact Directory, Warden Assignments, Assembly Points, and Equipment Inventory. The safety keywords that must be bolded are 'EVACUATE', 'SHELTER IN PLACE', 'LOCKDOWN', 'CALL 911', and 'DO NOT'.
